info.name: Awali Dashboard API
info.description:
# Awali Real Estate Dashboard — Complete API Documentation

## Overview
Enterprise-grade REST API for the Awali CRM & Property Management Dashboard.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a Bearer token:
```
Authorization: Bearer {{awali_access_token}}
```

## Base URL
- Development: `{{awali_base_url}}` → `http://localhost:5000/api/v1`

## Response Format
- **Success**: `{ success: true, data: {...}, meta: {...} }`
- **Error**: `{ success: false, error: { code, message, details } }`

## Pagination
`?page=1&limit=20`

## Sorting
`?sort=-createdAt,name` (dash prefix = descending)

## Filtering
`?status=available&bedrooms=3`

## Range filtering
`?price.amount[gte]=300000&price.amount[lte]=500000`

## Text search
`?search=villa`

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Login, register, token management, and profile endpoints.

request.description:
Creates a new user account. Requires super-admin Bearer token.

**Required fields:** email, password, name.en, name.ar, role (ObjectId)

**Password rules:** 8+ chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.

Authenticates a user and returns access + refresh tokens.

**Auto-saves** `awali_access_token`, `awali_refresh_token`, and `awali_user_id` to environment via test script.

exec: console.log('✅ New tokens saved to environment');

request.description:
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token + refresh token pair.

**Auto-saves** new tokens to environment via test script.
Invalidates the provided refresh token, ending the session.

Changes the current user's password. Both old and new password required.

**Password rules:** 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user, including their role and permissions.

item.name: 👥 Users
item.description: User management — create agents, managers, and admins.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of all users.
Returns a single user by their MongoDB ObjectId.

Creates a new platform user.

**Required:** email, password, name.en, name.ar, role (ObjectId)

Auto-saves `awali_user_id` to environment.

Partially updates a user's profile. All fields optional.

**Updatable:** email, name.en, name.ar, phone, role, avatar (URL)
Soft-deletes a user (sets isDeleted=true). User data is preserved for audit purposes.
Activates a deactivated user account, allowing them to log in.
Deactivates a user account. They will not be able to log in until re-activated.
Text search across user name and email fields.
Returns only users assigned to a specific role.
Filter users by their active/inactive status.
Combines search, filter, sort, and pagination in a single query.

item.name: 🛡️ Roles & Permissions
item.description: Dynamic RBAC — create and manage roles with granular per-module permissions.

request.description: Returns all roles with their full permission matrices.
Returns a single role with its complete permissions object.

body.raw:
{
  "nameEn": "Sales Agent",
  "nameAr": "وكيل مبيعات",
  "description": {
    "en": "Field sales agent with CRM access",
    "ar": "وكيل مبيعات ميداني مع صلاحيات CRM"
  },
  "permissions": {
    "units": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "clients": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": true, "delete": false },
    "deals": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": true, "delete": false },
    "tasks": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": true, "delete": true },
    "communications": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "documents": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "analytics": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "users": { "create": false, "read": false, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "roles": { "create": false, "read": false, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "audit_logs": { "create": false, "read": false, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "building_types": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "unit_types": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "features": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "interest_tracking": { "create": false, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false },
    "media": { "create": true, "read": true, "update": false, "delete": false }
  }
}

request.description:
Creates a new role with a granular permissions matrix.

**Permission modules:** users, roles, units, building_types, unit_types, features, clients, deals, tasks, activities, communications, documents, analytics, settings, audit_logs, media

Auto-saves `awali_role_id` to environment.
Updates a role's name, description, or individual module permissions. System roles (isSystem=true) cannot be modified.
Deletes a role. Fails if users are assigned to the role or if it is a system role.
Returns only active/inactive roles.

item.name: 🏢 Units (Properties)
item.description: Core property module — manage listings, images, and documents.

request.description: Returns a single unit. **Auto-tracks a view interest log** for the current user.

Creates a new property unit.

**Required:** unitNumber, buildingType (ObjectId), unitType (ObjectId), price.amount

**Status enum:** available, reserved, under_contract, sold, maintenance

**Facade enum:** north, south, east, west, north-east, north-west, south-east, south-west

Auto-saves `awali_unit_id` to environment.

Changes the unit's status.

**Enum:** available, reserved, under_contract, sold, maintenance

formdata.description: Select 1–20 image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF). Max 10MB each.

request.description:
Uploads one or more property images directly to Cloudflare R2.

**Content-Type:** multipart/form-data
**Field name:** images
**Allowed types:** JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF
**Max size:** 10MB per image, up to 20 images per request

variable.description: The R2 object key from the image object

request.description:
Deletes a specific image from Cloudflare R2 and removes it from the unit record.

**URL param:** imageKey — the R2 object key (e.g., `units/uuid-photo.jpg`)
Reorders images and sets the primary (cover) image. Provide full image array with new order values.

formdata.description: Single file (PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max 25MB.

request.description:
Uploads a document (floor plan, deed, etc.) to Cloudflare R2 and attaches it to the unit.

**Allowed types:** PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 25MB

query.description: Text search in unitNumber, description.en, description.ar

item.name: Sort by Price — Low to High
Sort by Price — High to Low

request.description: Returns counts of units grouped by status (available, reserved, sold, etc.)
Returns top units ranked by view count from interest tracking logs.

item.name: 🏗️ Building Types
item.description: Manage dynamic building type attributes (e.g., Villa, Apartment, Townhouse). Bilingual nameEn + nameAr.

exec: console.log('✅ Building Type ID saved:', jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Creates a new building type. Auto-saves `awali_building_type_id`.
Deletes a building type. Fails if units reference it.

item.name: 🏠 Unit Types
item.description: Manage dynamic unit type attributes (e.g., Studio, 1BR, 2BR, Penthouse). Bilingual.

exec: console.log('✅ Unit Type ID saved:', jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Creates a unit type. Auto-saves `awali_unit_type_id`.

item.name: ✨ Features (Amenities)
item.description: Manage dynamic property features/amenities. Category enum: amenity, characteristic, facility, service.

request.description:
Creates a feature/amenity.

**category enum:** amenity, characteristic, facility, service

Auto-saves `awali_feature_id`.

item.name: 👤 Clients (CRM Leads)
item.description: CRM client/lead management with pipeline stages, assignment, and AI-powered unit matching.

request.description:
Creates a new CRM lead/client.

**Required:** name.en, name.ar, phone

**type enum:** individual, company

**source enum:** website, referral, social_media, walk_in, phone, advertising, exhibition, other

Auto-saves `awali_client_id`.

Moves client to a new pipeline stage.

**status enum:** new, contacted, interested, qualified, negotiating, won, lost

For `lost` status, optionally include `lostReason`.

query.description: new | contacted | interested | qualified | negotiating | won | lost

request.description: Returns a chronological timeline of all activities, communications, tasks, and deals associated with this client.
Returns available units that best match the client's budget and property preferences.
Returns client counts at each pipeline stage, conversion rates, and funnel analytics.

item.name: 💰 Deals (Pipeline)
item.description: Sales pipeline management — track deals from inquiry through contract to closed.

request.description:
Creates a new deal in the sales pipeline.

**Required:** title, client (ObjectId), unit (ObjectId), value.amount, assignedTo (ObjectId)

**stage enum:** inquiry, viewing, negotiation, proposal, contract, closed_won, closed_lost

Auto-saves `awali_deal_id`.

Advances or changes the deal's pipeline stage.

**stage enum:** inquiry, viewing, negotiation, proposal, contract, closed_won, closed_lost

For `closed_lost`, include `lostReason` field.

Records a payment against a deal.

**method enum:** cash, bank_transfer, cheque, credit_card
Returns deals grouped by pipeline stage with totals and value summaries for the Kanban board view.
Returns deal counts, total pipeline value, win/loss rates, and average deal size.

item.name: 📋 Tasks
item.description: CRM task management — follow-ups, meetings, viewings, document requests.

body.raw:
{
  "title": {
    "en": "Schedule unit viewing for Al-Otaibi",
    "ar": "جدولة معاينة الوحدة للعتيبي"
  },
  "description": "Client wants to view Villa A-101 this weekend",
  "type": "viewing",
  "priority": "high",
  "dueDate": "2026-02-15T10:00:00.000Z",
  "assignedTo": "{{awali_user_id}}",
  "relatedClient": "{{awali_client_id}}",
  "relatedDeal": "{{awali_deal_id}}",
  "relatedUnit": "{{awali_unit_id}}",
  "notes": "Confirm time slot with client by phone"
}

request.description:
Creates a new task.

**Required:** title.en, dueDate, assignedTo (ObjectId)

**type enum:** follow_up, meeting, call, viewing, document_request, other

**priority enum:** low, medium, high, urgent

Auto-saves `awali_task_id`.
Marks a task as completed with the current timestamp.
Returns all tasks assigned to the currently authenticated user, sorted by due date.
Returns all incomplete tasks whose due date has passed. Useful for dashboard alerts.

item.name: 📞 Communications
item.description: Log and track client communication — calls, emails, WhatsApp, meetings, SMS.

body.raw:
{
  "client": "{{awali_client_id}}",
  "type": "phone_call",
  "direction": "outbound",
  "subject": "Follow-up on Villa A-101 viewing interest",
  "content": "Called client to confirm interest in Villa A-101. Client is very interested and wants to schedule a viewing this weekend.",
  "duration": 8,
  "outcome": "follow_up_needed",
  "nextAction": "Schedule viewing appointment",
  "nextActionDate": "2026-02-12T10:00:00.000Z",
  "relatedDeal": "{{awali_deal_id}}"
}

request.description:
Logs a new client communication event.

**Required:** client (ObjectId), type, direction, subject

**type enum:** phone_call, email, whatsapp, meeting, sms, other

**direction enum:** inbound, outbound

**outcome enum:** successful, no_answer, voicemail, callback_requested, not_interested, follow_up_needed

Auto-saves `awali_comm_id`.
Returns all communications for a specific client, sorted by date descending.

item.name: 📄 Documents
item.description: Upload and manage property/deal documents stored on Cloudflare R2.

formdata.description: Single file: PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 25MB)
contract | deed | id_copy | floor_plan | proposal | invoice | receipt | other

request.description:
Uploads a document file to Cloudflare R2 and saves metadata to the database.

**Content-Type:** multipart/form-data

**type enum:** contract, deed, id_copy, floor_plan, proposal, invoice, receipt, other

Auto-saves `awali_doc_id`.
Deletes the document metadata from MongoDB AND removes the file object from Cloudflare R2.

item.name: 👁️ Interest Tracking
item.description: Analytics for unit views and search patterns — powers the "trending" and "most popular" features.

request.description: Returns units ranked by total view count from interest logs.
Returns the most frequent search keywords entered by agents.
Returns units with the highest view velocity (views per day) in the recent period.
Returns detailed view analytics for a specific unit — total views, unique viewers, view history.
Returns aggregated search filter usage — which filters (status, price range, bedrooms, etc.) are most commonly applied.

item.name: 📊 Analytics & Reports
item.description: Dashboard KPIs, sales reports, pipeline health, and agent performance analytics.

request.description: Returns the main dashboard KPIs: total units, total clients, active deals, revenue this month, tasks due today, and overdue tasks.
Returns sales volume, revenue trends, and closed deals over time.
Returns pipeline stage distribution, total pipeline value, and average deal velocity.
Returns performance metrics per agent: deals won, revenue generated, clients managed, tasks completed.
Returns client conversion funnel — how many leads move through each stage and where they drop off.
Returns unit inventory breakdown by status, type, building type, and price ranges.

item.name: 📝 Audit Logs
item.description: Immutable change history for all write operations. Read-only — no create/update/delete.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all audit log entries.

**Optional filters:** action (create/update/delete), resourceType

Returns the full change history for a specific resource.

**URL params:** type (resourceType e.g. 'units', 'clients'), id (resource ObjectId)
Returns all audit log entries created by a specific user — useful for activity auditing.

item.name: 🏥 System Health
item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring and uptime checks.

request.description: Basic health check. Returns server uptime, environment, and version. No authentication required.
Extended health check including MongoDB ping and Redis connection status. Requires authentication.
